New year, fresh starts — they say. That’s why we’re giving away two €2,000 Tylko vouchers, valid for sofas, shelving, wardrobes, and blankets — basically, every Tylko piece 🤍

Prizes
 • 2 x winners: €2,000 Tylko voucher 🎁

How to enter (until 29.01):
 • Make sure you’re following @tylko
 • Comment below and tell us where you get cosy at home and which Tylko piece would complete that space 🛋️
 • Tag someone you’d get cosy with 
 • Share this post to your Stories (optional)

Think soft light, slow mornings, winter evenings, favourite corners, and future shelf dreams 🌙 The most creative answers win! 

Good luck — and happy start to 2026! ✨

——
T&Cs
Open to EU, UK and Switzerland based customers only. Competition closes 29/01/2026 at 23:59 (CEST). Two winners will be chosen by the Tylko team based on creativity of entry and contacted via DM from the official @tylko Instagram account only. Prizes: Two winners will each receive a voucher worth €2,000 to spend at the Tylko online store (tylko.com), valid for 3 months from the date of issue. The voucher cannot be combined with any other discount, promotion or sale on the website. This giveaway is not sponsored, endorsed or administered by, or associated with Instagram. Link to full T&Cs in our bio.

body:
We asked Lex Pott — the Dutch designer behind icons like the Twist and Pillar candles — what he thought of the Smooth Sofa. 

@lexpott already has a few Tylko pieces at home, so bringing in the Smooth Sofa felt like a natural next step. We love how it fits right in — both in how it looks and how it works in his everyday setup ✨ 

What stood out to him most were the details that make Smooth more than just a beautiful object: 
◽️ Modular design – easily adapts to shifting spaces and needs

What should we dream up next?
